title: Quantum Immortality: Your Endless Life?
narration: Quantum Immortality dictates consciousness never ceases. The universe splits with every quantum event. A quantum measurement forces reality to branch. In one branch, the observer survives the event. In another, they do not. The observer's consciousness always follows the surviving branch. This branching ensures a continuous subjective experience, forever.
